app.name: RafRaf

app.promise: Nothing gets lost. Everything is visible. The app works even when the internet doesn't.

home.subheading: A smart, secure, offline-ready inventory system — the replacement for the notebook and Excel.

meta.title: RafRaf — the digital shelf for every merchant
meta.description: An all-in-one platform for inventory, sales and debt ledgers, built for the Syrian market. Your data is safely stored in the cloud.
meta.ogDescription: Manage your inventory, sales and debt ledgers from any device. Built for the Syrian merchant.

hero.subtitle: The first all-in-one platform built for the realities of the Syrian market. Manage your inventory, sales and debt ledgers with ease.
hero.imageAlt: A merchant using RafRaf on their phone

problem.title: Goodbye to the old headaches
problem.subtitle: RafRaf is designed to solve the Syrian merchant's real challenges.

power.title: Lost data?
power.text: All your data is safely stored in the cloud — reach it from any device, anytime.

debt.title: Messy debt ledgers
debt.text: Organize customer and supplier debts in one place, with smart reminders for collection dates.

inventory.title: Tiring manual stock-takes
inventory.text: Barcode scanning and automatic stock-taking tell you exactly what you have and what you need before you run out.

smart.title: Smart inventory
smart.text: Precise analytics on your best-selling and most profitable products.

offline.title: ⚡ Fast & smooth
offline.text: A fast, comfortable interface built for the Syrian merchant.

debt.title: Debt ledger
debt.text: Track every lira you're owed or you owe, with professional account statements.

reports.title: Clear reports
reports.text: Detailed daily, weekly and monthly reports on financial and tax performance.

backup.title: ☁️ Auto-save
backup.text: Your data is saved automatically, moment by moment. Never lose a thing.

telegram.title: Telegram alerts
telegram.text: Debt reminders to customers and daily summaries to the merchant, sent directly over Telegram.

s1.title: Register your store
s1.text: Create your account and name your business.

s2.title: Add your products
s2.text: Use the barcode scanner or add them manually.

s3.title: Start selling
s3.text: Make your first sale with ease.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that fits your growth
pricing.subtitle: Pricing for everyone, from the small shop to large companies.

devSection.title: Built for developers too
devSection.text: Connect your accounting software or online store to RafRaf through a simple, powerful API. Full control of your data with strong security.

t1.text: “RafRaf saved me the headache of debt ledgers. Now everything is clear and recorded instantly, and the customer gets a message right away.”
t1.name: Ahmad Mansour

t2.text: “The best feature is working offline. With our electricity situation, RafRaf is the only one that keeps serving me without stopping my work.”
t2.name: Sara Othman

t3.text: “We used to waste hours on stock-takes; now with one tap I know everything in my warehouse. A truly professional app.”
t3.name: Yassin Kurdi

finalCta.title: Ready to upgrade your business?
finalCta.text: Join hundreds of merchants who trust RafRaf to organize their work.
finalCta.note: No credit card required for the trial.

footer.tagline: The digital shelf for every Syrian merchant. Security, speed and simplicity in managing stock and debts.
footer.rights: All rights reserved to RafRaf Digital © 2024

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using RafRaf you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully.

sections.b: Creating an account or using the service means you accept these terms and the Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

Use RafRaf only to manage your own store, inventory, sales and debt ledgers. You may not use the service for any unlawful purpose, attempt to breach it, circumvent plan limits, or harm other merchants. You are responsible for the accuracy of the data you enter and for keeping your account password confidential.

Features and usage limits (product count, API requests per minute, smart features) differ by your plan: Free, Basic, or Smart. We may adjust these limits with prior notice. Exceeding the limits may temporarily restrict the service.
Your store data remains yours. We store it securely and let you export it (PDF/Excel) and back it up. You are responsible for keeping copies of your important data.

The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from use of the service, including loss of data, profits, or service interruptions. You alone are responsible for business decisions made based on the app's information.
We may suspend or terminate your account if these terms are violated. You may also delete your account at any time; your data is then removed per the Privacy Policy.
We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after an update means you accept the new terms.
For any questions about these terms, contact us through RafRaf's support channels.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We respect your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, and how we use and protect it.

sections.b: Account data (email and name), your store data (products, sales, purchases, customers, suppliers, debts), and your Telegram chat ID if you link one. We don't collect more than what's needed to run the service.
We use your data to run the app, show your reports, sync them across your devices, and send the notifications you request. We do not sell your data or share it with advertisers.
When you choose to sign in with Google, we receive only your email and basic name to create your account. We do not access your Gmail or your Google files.
Your data is stored in a Supabase (PostgreSQL) database protected by full per-store isolation (RLS) — no other merchant can see your data. We rely on encryption in transit.
Product images and your store logo — if you add them — are uploaded to Cloudinary via a secure signed upload, and stored only within a folder dedicated to your store.

If you enable Telegram notifications, we send summaries, low-stock alerts and debt reminders through a Telegram bot. You can turn this off any time in Settings. We never message your customers except at your request.

You can delete your products and customers any time from within the app. To permanently delete your account and all your data, contact us and we'll remove it within a reasonable period, except what we're legally required to retain.
For any question about your privacy or to request data deletion, contact us through RafRaf's support channels.

meta.title: RafRaf API — for developers
meta.description: An official REST API to manage inventory, sales and customers programmatically. Per-store keys, fine-grained scopes, and atomic operations.

hero.title: A powerful API for inventory
hero.subtitle: Connect your accounting system or online store to RafRaf through a simple, secure REST API. Per-store keys, read/write scopes, and idempotent atomic sales.

quickStart.title: Quick start
quickStart.intro: Create a key in your store settings, then send it in the Authorization header on every request.
quickStart.authComment: # Auth — send the key on every request
quickStart.saleComment: # Record a sale — atomic and safe to retry

auth.title: Authentication & scopes
auth.keysText: Each key belongs to a single store, is shown only once at creation, and is stored hashed (SHA-256). Manage your keys in Settings then API keys.
auth.scopesText: A read-only key holds the three read scopes; a read-write key holds all six: products / transactions / customers.

endpoints.title: Endpoints
endpoints.subtitle: All paths live under /api/v1 and return JSON.

notes.createTx: Record a transaction — atomic, idempotent on client_uuid

errors.title: Errors & rate limits
errors.text: Every error returns { error: { code, message } } with the matching HTTP status: 401 auth, 403 scope or revoked key, 404 not found, 422 transaction failed, 429 over limit.
errors.rateText: The per-minute request limit depends on your store's plan (see below).

pricing.title: Plan limits
pricing.subtitle: API access is in every plan — only the per-minute request limit changes.

finalCta.title: Ready to build on RafRaf?
finalCta.text: Create an account, generate an API key in Settings, and start integrating in minutes.
